title: Add bytesToHuman utility function
description: Add a `bytesToHuman` utility function in src/utils/bytes-to-human.ts that converts byte counts to human-readable strings. Must handle bytes up to petabytes (PB), round to 2 decimal places, and return '0 B' for 0 bytes. Include co-located tests in src/utils/bytes-to-human.test.ts. Export signature: `export function bytesToHuman(bytes: number): string`

existing_patterns.description: Simple pure utility function with JSDoc, single export
Co-located vitest test file with describe/it/expect pattern
